docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,290.73 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, ARTURO AS TO DEFENDANT BEST BUY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ARTURO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BEST BUY IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANTONY VARGHESE (SALES MANAGER). DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $646.73 TO THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF ARTURO RODRIGUEZ CAN RETURN THE TELEVISION FOR A REFUND OF $646.73. FAILURE TO RETURN THE TELEVISION BY DEC-12-2021 WILL RESULT IN THE CASE BEING DISMISSED AT THE NEXT COURT DATE ON FEB-22-2022. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE FEB-22-2022 HEARING IF NO RETURN IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, ARTURO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT BEST BUY
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
